title: BUbreakingHeadlines
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: The teams and players with the most Super Bowl wins in NFL history
items.description: Ahead of Super Bowl 2026 today, Feb. 8, here's a list of the teams and players with the most Super Bowl wins in NFL history.

items.title: WATCH:  New clues emerge in Nancy Guthrie abduction case
items.description: The family of Nancy Guthrie is pleading for her safe return a week after the 84-year-old was allegedly abducted from her home in Tucson, Arizona.

items.title: Breezy Johnson wins Team USA's first gold medal of 2026 Winter Olympics
items.description: Breezy Johnson took the lead early on after flying down the mountain in 1:36.10. It is her first-ever Olympic medal.

items.title: Savannah Guthrie in new video pleads for mother's return: 'We will pay'
items.description: "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie and her siblings released a new video saying they have received a message and begged for their mother's return.

items.title: Lindsey Vonn crashes out in women's downhill race at 2026 Winter Olympics
items.description: Lindsey Vonn, who came out of retirement to compete in the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Games, was airlifted off the mountain.

items.title: Starmer's aide quits over ambassador appointment despite Epstein links
items.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's chief of staff, Morgan McSweeney, said he took responsibility for advising Starmer to appoint Peter Mandelson.

items.title: GOP Rep. Lawler says image posted by Trump mocking Obamas was 'racist'
items.description: New York Republican Congressman Mike Lawler doubled down on his criticism of a racist social media post from President Donald Trump's account.

items.title: Athletes to watch from Team USA at the Winter Olympics
items.description: American athletes are going for the gold at the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics. These are some of the top Team USA competitors to watch.

items.title: WATCH:  3 rescued after falling through icy waters
items.description: Members of the NYPD and the FDNY rescued three men who fell through the ice in Queens. They were treated at local hospitals.
